questions: how to be a better negotiator?
answers: Negotiation is a discussion aimed at reaching an agreement where both parties feel they've gained something. It's a crucial skill in business, career, and everyday life.
Salary negotiate korte market rate research koro, tomar value clearly explain koro, confident theko, ar first offer accept koro na. Always counter with data to back your ask.
Good negotiation tips: prepare thoroughly, listen more than you talk, understand the other side's needs, aim for win-win, and don't be afraid of silence — it's a powerful tool.
To be a better negotiator, practice empathy, know your BATNA (Best Alternative to a Negotiated Agreement), stay calm under pressure, and always be willing to walk away if the deal isn't right.
